1:
A month of decisive action and turning plans into reality. Don't be afraid to take a risk and seize your chance. Direct all your attention toward the future: past affairs and lingering doubts will only drain the energy you now need to move forward. This is the most fitting month to begin something new - a new job, a new friendship, a new passion... or, at the very least, to change something boldly in your life. Be yourself, and don't hesitate to express your individuality and uniqueness, your originality and your gift for creativity. 
At the same time, this month you will most likely have to rely on yourself and not count too heavily on the support of those around you.
2:
A month of calm, stability, and the pursuit of understanding. Be attentive to details, nuances, and subtle hints, and take your time to consider what they may mean for you. Don't let your emotions slip out of control and take the upper hand.
In your affairs this month, there's no need to rush ahead. After the intense activity of the previous month, let what you've begun move along by its own momentum; observe how things unfold without your pressure, and draw conclusions for the future: perhaps a few details will need adjusting. Cooperation with others is highly desirable. Help them, and they will support you in turn - in both cases this will advance your intentions. It's quite likely that those who draw close to you this month will later become your long-term partners.
3: This month it's best to devote yourself to pursuits that bring you joy and delight, that inspire you and help you take pleasure in life. Anything connected with duty, obligation, and other serious yet not particularly pleasant matters is better postponed to another time. If you have the opportunity, take a vacation, set off on a journey, or in some other way add a little adventure to your life. A wonderful month for creativity, hobbies, and passions - for everything that calls upon imagination, intuition, and inspiration.
4: A serious month. The numerological rhythms help you focus on matters that demand considerable effort and organization. A suitable time for setting things in order, strengthening your foundation, and finding and eliminating the weak spots in your project. Be practical, rational, and try to act according to some kind of system. If something isn't working out, assess the obstacle that has arisen. Perhaps it's telling you that something needs to change within yourself or in your approach to the matter. But it's also possible that the obstacle is simply blocking a path that leads nowhere, helping you avoid going astray.
5: A month of expanding horizons. It favors meeting new people, visiting interesting places, and exploring varied opportunities and forms of activity. Throw yourself actively into the most diverse undertakings and don't miss your chance - exciting journeys and adventures await you. This month, changes are likely in one area of life or another. It may well be that if you follow these changes, you'll add many new and interesting possibilities to your life. On the other hand, if you lean toward a more stable and orderly existence, this month may feel far too hectic.
6: This month, give greater attention to matters of home, family responsibilities, and time spent with those close to you. Try to understand the needs of those dear to you and to respond to them with all your heart. The more care and warmth you give to others this month, the more you will receive yourself. A good month for love, romantic encounters, marriage, and all that helps people grow closer and understand one another better. It's also a favorable time for pursuits connected with art - painting, music, theater. The beauty and harmony of the world around you will reveal themselves and fill your creative imagination with color.
7: Allow yourself to spend more time in solitude, away from the noisy crowd. This is a month of reflection, contemplation, and deep analysis. It's advisable not to overload yourself with work and to set domestic matters aside for a while, so that you can come to understand your deepest inner needs - to see what hinders your outlook on life and what calls out to be fulfilled. A good month for research, for studying profound and complex subjects, and also for engaging with occult disciplines. The subconscious will be active and more accessible than usual, so listen more often to the voice of intuition and reflect on the symbolism of your dreams.
8:
This month helps you act in an organized and effective way. Your drive to see a tangible result from your efforts grows stronger, as does your ability to hold several different directions in mind at once and to guide the actions of others. If a chance arises to take on additional responsibility or duties, don't turn it down - and your influence over the course of events will grow noticeably. This month is well suited for earning money or laying the groundwork for future prosperity. Even if you're not a businessperson by nature, try playing the part. 
Act with confidence, be guided by common sense, and evaluate everything in terms of real, tangible benefit. Strive to use your influence on others, and cultivate within yourself the ability to exert that influence.
9: This month is best suited for completing various affairs, summing things up, and settling debts. There's no need to push forward. On the contrary, reflect on what you might leave behind in the past, thereby freeing up space, time, and strength for new projects still unknown to you. Be generous; spare neither time nor effort for others. The more you give this month, the more you'll receive in the future - and precisely at the moment when you most need someone's support.
